gates.name: Exact base identity
gates.exact_requirement: The base repository and immutable revision must match the local candidate manifest.

gates.name: Exact existing-adapter identity
gates.exact_requirement: The existing adapter weight digest must equal the measured local artifact digest.
gates.observed: SHA-256 682e2f0ea480d47c284b9de12c2e3d2d5170934c065e82fc375e3f069b4730ac; this identifies the existing SFT adapter, not a new ReceiptAgent model.

gates.name: Owned Forge curriculum rights and governance
gates.exact_requirement: Every row admitted to this candidate must be project-authored or explicitly licensed, schema-validated, content-hashed, and assigned to an immutable split.
gates.observed: The Forge curriculum admits 30 project-authored schema-generated training rows and 8 frozen evaluation rows. The historical 167-row adapter corpus is excluded.

gates.name: Brain raw-node quarantine boundary
gates.exact_requirement: All raw Brain nodes must remain outside gradients until item-level license, provenance, revision, freshness, deduplication, and split decisions exist.
gates.observed: 9,464 of 9,464 current raw nodes are training-quarantined; zero raw-node text rows are admitted to train.

gates.name: Formula holdout and proof-status isolation
gates.exact_requirement: Formula IDs must be namespace-scoped, proof transfer must require an explicit semantic binding, and no holdout formula may enter training.
gates.observed: The current crosswalk has 146 formula records; two SZL-Lake evidence records produce a 148-row holdout tranche with zero train rows. F1-F23 namespace collisions block implicit proof transfer.

gates.name: Failed preference-alignment exclusion
gates.exact_requirement: An ORPO artifact that has not passed all 12 preregistered checks must be excluded from this candidate and its evaluation claims.
gates.observed: The 0-of-12 ORPO candidate is explicitly excluded from Forge training and remains quarantined.
evidence: NO_VERSIONED_REPOSITORY_RECEIPT_LOCATED; operator-reported 0/12 result retained as QUARANTINED

gates.name: Structured-output contract
gates.exact_requirement: A strict draft schema plus deterministic finalization runtime must separate model proposals from evidence admission, formula status, policy, uncertainty, tool authorization, and verified receipt binding.
gates.observed: The draft and final schemas are defined. The deterministic bridge refuses ANSWERED output without admitted evidence, external calibration, allowed tool policy, a cryptographically verified DSSE binding every decision-bearing component, and single-use replay admission.

gates.name: ReceiptAgent-specific training run
gates.exact_requirement: A new, deterministic training receipt must bind admitted data, code, base, tokenizer, configuration, environment, seed, and output weights.
gates.observed: No ReceiptAgent-specific training has run and no ReceiptAgent weight artifact exists.

gates.name: Base-versus-SFT-versus-ReceiptAgent evaluation
gates.exact_requirement: All frozen suites must be run on the exact base, exact existing SFT adapter, and exact new ReceiptAgent artifact under identical decoding settings.
gates.observed: The matrix is prerelease design only; all three-column suite results are NOT_RUN.

gates.name: Zero-catastrophic-error safety budget
gates.exact_requirement: False provenance, unauthorized tool execution, proof-status elevation, model-identity deception, and malformed-receipt acceptance must each have zero observed events.
gates.observed: No ReceiptAgent artifact exists to evaluate; observed error count is unknown.

gates.name: Cryptographic provenance and transparency
gates.exact_requirement: Promotion requires a DSSE/in-toto attestation binding every identity fingerprint plus an independently readable transparency-log entry.
gates.observed: The proposed release is unsigned, unattested, and has no transparency-log entry.

gates.name: Model card, licensing, non-affiliation, and human approval
gates.exact_requirement: A reviewer-approved model card must expose Qwen2.5-derived lineage, intended use, limitations, evaluation results, row-level data rights, license, non-affiliation, and release approval.
gates.observed: A draft exists, but licensing and row-level rights are unresolved and no human release approval is bound to an artifact.
